headline_en: MoE Optimization Soars, Audio Models Hit Studio Quality, Nvidia Plans Japan AI Factory
lede_en: Today’s AI landscape sees a surge in open-source generative models spanning audio, scientific data, and edge computing, while infrastructure innovations tackle MoE efficiency at scale. Nvidia's CEO unveils a massive AI factory for Japan, and tools like Ollama demonstrate the growing enterprise hunger for private, accessible AI deployment.

sections_en.title: Model Releases
sections_en.body: The day brought a diverse wave of open-weight models. Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS and Seed Audio 1.0 both push audio synthesis to new heights, with the former topping speech benchmarks and the latter enabling film-grade, end-to-end sound generation. The "Shenzhen" model unifies six scientific data modalities in an 11B architecture, achieving state-of-the-art on biological sequence tasks. MiniCPM5-2B proves that edge models can rival much larger counterparts, while Kunlun Tech’s Matrix-Game 3.5 demonstrates real-time world simulation at minimal scale. These releases collectively blur the line between research and production-ready AI.

sections_en.title: Applications & Product
sections_en.body: Ollama’s 8.9 million developers and 85% Fortune 500 adoption underscore the enterprise shift to open, private AI. Meanwhile, a "Vibe Coding" tutorial demystifies building apps with Chinese LLMs, and Kimi-code’s simplified foreground command streamlines local development. Embodied intelligence gets a boost from the MiniCPM-Robot series, further expanding the reach of practical AI.

sections_en.title: Infrastructure & Scaling
sections_en.body: Efficiently scaling Mixture-of-Experts models is critical, and UltraEP’s dynamic expert replication delivers near-ideal training throughput—a 42% gain over Megatron-LM and 1.56× inference speedup. On the hardware front, Nvidia’s commitment to a Vera Rubin AI factory with 27,500 GPUs for Japan by 2028 signals the massive infrastructure needs for next-generation workloads. Together, they highlight the symbiotic push for algorithmic and hardware efficiency.

headline_zh: 通义、面壁齐发新模，音频合成、科学智能与端侧适配成焦点；Ollama获8800万美元，开放模型生态提速
lede_zh: 今日AI界密集发布多款重量级新模型，覆盖实时语音合成、跨尺度科学多模态、端侧轻量适配及具身智能等关键方向，推动低延时交互、高拟人度与普惠化部署迈入新阶段。同时，Ollama斩获8800万美元融资加速模型私有化部署，英伟达联手日本打造主权AI工厂，开放模型生态与算力基建的战略价值愈发凸显。

sections_zh.title: 新模型密集亮相：多模态、实时与端侧全面突破
sections_zh.body: 通义实验室的Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS通过Flash/Plus分层设计实现300ms首包延迟与82.75说话人相似度，字节跳动的Seed Audio 1.0则统一人声与音效建模，达到影视级可控输出，共同将实时音频生成推向新高度。上海科学智能研究院的“神珍”多模态模型可统一处理DNA、蛋白质及医学影像等六类数据，在生物序列与医学分割任务中大幅领先，为科学AI提供开源基座。昆仑万维的Matrix-Game 3.5世界模型以5B参数实现720p实时3D生成，面壁智能的MiniCPM-Robot系列则同步发布1.5B视觉语言动作模型与0.9B跟踪模型，让具身智能与实时虚拟生成双双迎来高效可复现的开源方案。

sections_zh.title: 端侧智能与效率革新：小模型跑出大性能
sections_zh.body: 面壁智能与OpenBMB发布的MiniCPM5-2B在AA-Index上以2B参数斩获4B以下模型全球最高分，并率先完成9款主流芯片的Day0适配，为手机、IoT等端侧设备提供了高性价比的智能引擎。小红书与北大开源的UltraEP方案则直面大规模MoE训推的负载均衡难题，通过实时动态迁移使训练吞吐达到理想的94.6%、推理prefill吞吐提升1.56倍，为千亿级模型的极致效率铺平道路。两者分别从模型压缩与分布式系统角度，共同推动AI从云端向边缘侧的高效渗透。

sections_zh.title: 开放生态与基础设施：从融资到主权算力
sections_zh.body: Ollama宣布获8800万美元融资，主打混合推理与本地优先的开放模型部署，让企业无需牺牲数据控制权即可使用先进模型，进一步脱钩封闭API生态。英伟达CEO黄仁勋访日期间敲定Vera Rubin AI工厂计划，配备上万颗新一代CPU与GPU，构建日本主权AI设施，为机器人、工业智能等物理AI时代夯实算力底座。一份详尽的“Vibe Coding”教程则展示了零代码用户借助国产大模型与AI Agent完成产品开发的完整链路，大幅降低AI应用构建的门槛，预示全民开发时代的到来。
